notes: Maps to Zapier's 'Facebook Pages' app. 'New Lead' is fulfilled by the separate Facebook Lead Ads integration upstream.

triggers.name: New Comment on Post
triggers.description: Fires when a comment is added on a post you made.

triggers.name: New Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a new lead is generated from a Facebook Lead Ad.

triggers.name: New Post by Others on Page
triggers.description: Fires when a visitor writes on your page.

triggers.name: New Post by You
triggers.description: Fires when you post to your Page's Timeline.
